---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused offline mind-map enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What user outcome should change?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the interaction and acceptance criteria.

## Constraints

- Must continue to work from `file://` with no build or runtime dependencies.
- Note any `MAP_SCHEMA_VERSION` or persistence migration impact.
- Preserve keyboard access, reduced motion, and responsive layouts.
- Browser testing must remain serialized with one Playwright worker and no
  parallel machine-slot matrix.

## Alternatives

Describe simpler approaches or existing workarounds.
